name: Cream of Pimiento Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place pimiento in a container of an electric blender and process until smooth, stopping occasionally to scrape down the sides. Set aside.
2. Melt butter in a heavy saucepan over low heat. Add flour and stir until the mixture is smooth. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
3. Gradually add chicken broth and half and half to the flour mixture. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and bubbles.
4. Stir in pimiento, onion, salt, and hot sauce. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until thoroughly heated.
Yield: 3 3/4 cups
